summary: Taiki Maeda has pivotally turned bullish in his most recent video, declaring 'The Bottom Is In' after months of shorting Ethereum.
narrative: He believes the market is currently bottoming and that STRC could act as a catalyst to propel BTC to higher prices, challenging common 4-Year Cycle theories with a new analytical framework. This marks a stark reversal from his previous strategy over the last several months, which focused heavily on shorting Ethereum and capital preservation.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
